use tracing::{debug_span, trace};

fn find_matches(data: &[u32], target: u32) -> Vec<usize> {
    // GOOD: span wraps the entire loop, not per-iteration
    let span = debug_span!("find_matches", target = target, len = data.len());
    let _enter = span.enter();

    data.iter()
        .enumerate()
        .filter(|(_, &val)| val == target)
        .map(|(i, _)| i)
        .collect()
}
